title: SiteNode
description: A projected place where term evidence lives: a repo file, log file, doctrine surface, workflow record, vault source, or Causality surface. It is folded from EvidenceEdge refs and never becomes the source of truth.

address.description: repo-relative path or log address projected from an evidence ref.

kind.description: DERIVED: the broad source-of-truth surface this address belongs to.

exists.description: DERIVED: at least one cited address for this site is readable on disk.

inbound_term_count.description: DERIVED: count of distinct TermNodes citing this site.

$comment: Invalid: treating a site as truth. SiteNodes are indexes over evidence refs; the cited bytes decide existence and resolution.
